Extension.Name: Scripts
Extension.Author: Ritze
Extension.Description: Run your own commands before, during, and after the game.

Pre-Launch (blocks until done).Name: Command
Pre-Launch (blocks until done).Description: Command to run before the game starts. Ritz waits for it to finish.

Post-Launch (runs in background).Name: Command
Post-Launch (runs in background).Description: Command to run after the game launches. Runs in the background.

Post-Exit (blocks until done).Name: Command
Post-Exit (blocks until done).Description: Command to run after the game exits. Ritz waits for it to finish.
